content.en:
After a long time, Ye Tian's body transformation was completed!

Nine times of whole body tempering, the immeasurable bone and immeasurable blood have reached the super-quality.

At this moment, Ye Tian's strength has improved too much!

Airplanes!

Ye Tian shuttled to the Infinite Realm Ruins, waved his hand, and let the Xuanqi armor fight against him.

Thundered!!!!

Ye Tian fought with the Xuanqi armor and crushed the Xuanqi armor throughout the whole process.

Of course, Ye Tian's strength was not much stronger than that of the Xuanqi armor.

However, in terms of combat power, he now has the top fifth-stage combat power!

Before it became a fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform, it had top-notch fifth-stage combat power, how terrifying it would be if this was spread out!

"It's a pity that the Xuanqi armor is useless to me!"

Ye Tianyi waved his hand and lifted this Xuanqi armor warrior.

Immediately, he was ready to copy the Infinite Realm Armor.

The Infinite Realm Armor he wanted to copy was naturally the Infinite Realm Armor from the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor.

When he was trading with the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor, before leaving, he asked the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor to show him the Infinite Realm Armor, and the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor also showed him.

He only glanced at it, but it was enough.

His purpose at that time was to copy the Infinite Realm Armor, and the Phosphorus Freedom Great Ancestor didn't know that Ye Tian had this ability, otherwise he would definitely not take it out.

In the following days, Ye Tian tried his best to copy the Infinite Realm Armor.

However, the Infinite Realm Armor was really a little difficult to replicate, consuming a lot of Ye Tian's energy, and it took millions of Realm First Year years to barely reproduce it.

"If the grade of the Infinite Realm Armor is higher, I'm afraid I won't be able to replicate it!"

Ye Tian thought to himself.

Now, the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior has copied it, and he has condensed a large amount of ruin gold into a ruin gold ball and placed it in a specific position on the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior's body.

Immediately, he urged the Infinite Realm Armorer!

Rumble!!!!

The energy of the ruin gold continued to be consumed, and the Infinite Realm Armor was successfully opened by him.

"Try the strength of the Infinite Realm Armorer. "

Ye Tian let the Infinite Realm Armor Warrior attack him, and he turned on his defense with all his strength, and even the Infinite Feather Armor Divine Power Mark was also opened.

I saw that the Infinite Feather Armor Warrior condensed a spear, and before Ye Tian could react, a blow pierced through his body, and even the Infinite Feather Armor defense was penetrated by a single blow, and the other defenses were not worth mentioning at all.

This blow not only pierced Ye Tian, but also caused his copy body to be annihilated instantly.

Soon.

Ye Tian's other replica body came and put away the Infinite Realm Armor.

"What a terrifying strength, this is the invincible fifth-stage combat power, the strength of my top-level fifth-stage combat power is like an ant in front of it, and I can't even resist!"

Ye Tian's heart palpitated.

In other words, if he encounters an invincible-level fifth-stage high-level immeasurable lifeform and clashes with it, he will be instantly killed by the opponent, and he has no power to resist.

However, now that he has this Infinite Realm Armor, it is equivalent to having such combat power.

"It's a pity that the copying talent can only copy one Infinite Realm armor, if it can be copied continuously, it will be awesome!"

Ye Tian said darkly.

After the immeasurable blood became a super-grade quality, the effect of Ye Tian's refining of the whole body was greatly improved, and if he used the Divine Sands to refine the whole body, it would not take too long to complete the tenth full-body tempering.

After the first year of the 60 million realms.

With the help of a large amount of Divine Sands, Ye Tian finally completed the tenth full-body tempering.

After the completion of this tempering, his body transformation was not small, and his strength increased greatly.

However, he is still at the top fifth stage of combat power, and there is still a long way to go from the peak fifth stage combat power.

In addition, when he faced the Infinite Realm Armorer, he was still the end of being a second.

......

"Gotta go to the Cosmos Tower!"

Ye Tian took out the Universal Order and muttered.

This is the Universal Order that the Phosphorus-Free Great Ancestor gave him, and it belongs to a token within the Universal Alliance, with the help of which you can enter the Universal Tower.

The Cosmos Tower is one of the most important treasures of the Cosmos Alliance, and can only be entered with the Cosmos Order in hand, while other members of the Cosmos Alliance cannot enter.

The Universal Alliance pays attention to fairness, but under normal circumstances, other Great Ancestors will not give you the opportunity to enter the Universal Tower in vain.

Ye Tian also browsed the space-time network of the Huanyu Alliance, and knew that the great ancestors who entered the Huanyu Tower were vaguely different from the other members of the Huanyu Alliance, and seemed to have higher authority.

The space-time network of the Universal Alliance seems to have something to do with the Universal Tower, but the specific situation is not clear to ordinary members of the Universal Alliance.

In conclusion, there are benefits to entering the Universal Tower.

As a result, many members of the Universal Alliance dream of obtaining a Universal Order, and are even willing to pay a huge price.

However, no one wants to sell a Cosmos Order.

Ye Tian had already refined the Cosmos Order, and at this moment, he directly urged the Cosmos Order.

In a flash.

His body was instantly teleported into the Cosmos Tower.

As soon as he entered the Cosmos Tower, he felt that his body was suppressed by a force that could only exert one percent of his strength at most.

However, he didn't panic at all.

Just then, a stream of information came.

After Ye Tian received the information, he knew some information.

"On the sixth floor of the Universal Tower, you can get ordinary members of the Universal Tower by breaking through the first floor, and if you break through the second floor, you can get the elite members of the Universal Tower, and if you break through the third floor, you can get the core member permissions......"

Ye Tian also knew from the information that every time he broke through a layer, he would get a big opportunity.

As for what the big chance is, he doesn't know yet.

Moreover, what the use of permissions is, he does not know anything.

"Tower trespassers, wait, you're about to start entering the first floor!"

The voice of the Cosmos Tower's machine spirit was heard.

Ye Tian waited quietly, and soon he was teleported to the first floor of the Cosmos Tower.

"Mission: Kill all the creatures on the first floor!"

However, after Ye Tian came to the first floor of the Huanyu Tower, his face suddenly changed.

"No, this is the Immeasurable Ruins!"

Ye Tian was shocked.

How did the Immeasurable Ruins become the first floor of the Cosmos Tower?

But soon, he reacted.

This is clearly the Cosmos Tower's locking of the Infinite Realm Ruins, which is the first layer of the Cosmos Tower.

In other words, every Great Ancestor enters the Huanyu Tower, and the first layer they enter is different.

At this moment, Ye Tian had to face a lot of immeasurable ruin monsters, including a fifth-stage immeasurable ruin monster.

Bang bang bang!!

Ye Tian shot again and again and killed those immeasurable ruin monsters.

Originally, he wanted to release the Infinite Realm Armor to see if he could use the Infinite Realm Armor to solve the problem, and if he could, he could break through to more layers.

However, before he could completely unleash the Infinite Realm Armorer, he was imprisoned by a force.

Obviously, he can only break into the Cosmos Tower on his own.

And Ye Tian's strength was strong enough to easily bombard the fifth-stage immeasurable ruin monster.

These immeasurable ruin monsters were locked up in this area and could not escape, so it didn't take long for Ye Tian to kill all the immeasurable ruin monsters here.
